title: Mark O'Halloran (rugby league)
extract: Mark O'Halloran (born 6 March 1981) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played for the Wests Tigers and the Penrith Panthers in the NRL, and the London Broncos in the ESL. His junior club was Burwood United in the Balmain District Competition. O'Halloran's position of choice was as a centre although he had also played as a wing, a defensive second rower, and briefly played five eighth in the English Super league.
